label: UI Keyed Contract Sheet
description: Every dnd5e:ui:* key grouped by surface (9-slice chrome, bar/gauge fills, status badges, initiative portraits, victory/defeat banners). 9-slice chrome entries are shown stretched 3x wide to verify sliceInsets don't distort ornamented corners.

label: Generated contract manifest
description: Copy of harness/models/synty/ui/contract/manifest.json from rpg-game-assets#18 at the time this evidence was captured -- generated by scripts/build_ui_contract_manifest.py from library/ui-contract-key-map.json.
